tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Just the normal chord shapes except for these:
[ch]Am[/ch]*  577555
[ch]Em7[/ch]  x79787
[ch]Bm7[/ch]* 797777
[ch]Bm7[/ch]  x24232
[ch]G[/ch]    355433


[Intro]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]*
Aaah ahaahaaha ahahaa haa ha[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]*
Ha ha ha ha ha  Hahaha[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]*
We may be big or small or black or white, eternally[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch]*
And black and white is you and me in a special light, ahaha[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]*
We may be young or old or in between, but this much I know[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
Together we can learn to grow[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Cm7[/ch]                           [ch]Bm7[/ch]
In a world that's ever turning it's back on you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
If you give it all away[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]Am7[/ch]
Make it mine, mine, mine, mine[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D7[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
You are desire, anything you need[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
I give you right or wrong[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]
And you are the woman that I[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
Base my whole existence on[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]
And when I get to you my[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Desire is glowing in your li-i-i-i-ight[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]*
These are the golden years we get to live[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]G[/ch]
We lead the way, tomorrow we can start today[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch]*
In a special light, ahaha[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]*
Love could be good or bad or in between, but this much I learn[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
Baby, you and I can learn[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Cm7[/ch]                            [ch]Bm7[/ch]
In a world that's rearranging its reality[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
If you give it all away[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]Am7[/ch]
Make it mine, mine, mine, mine[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]

And when I get to you my[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Desire is glowing in your li-i-i-i-ight[/tab]

[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]*
Ahaha ahahaahaa ahaahaahahaa[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em7[/ch]    [ch]Bm7[/ch]*
Ha ha ha ha ha  Ahaha[/tab]
